summary: Comprehensive testing of Recruitment Analytics Schema Refactor. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login, dashboard counts, hierarchical panels, data modals with confirm_box field, upload modal, and logout. Fixed bug: Rejected modal was using 'confirm' instead of 'confirm_box' in column array.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Column array used 'confirm' instead of 'confirm_box' (line 677)

backend: API health check - returns healthy status v4.0
Upload Naukri CSV - processes 10 records with mapped_columns and unmapped_columns
Naukri UPSERT - re-upload gives 0 inserted, 10 updated
Upload Pipeline CSV - processes 7 records with mapped_columns and unmapped_columns
Pipeline UPSERT - re-upload gives 0 inserted, 7 updated
Dashboard counts structure - all 9 fields present
All endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Login with admin/admin redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows correct summary cards (Total=10, Registered=7, Unregistered=3)
Expanding Registered shows Shortlisted(6) and Rejected(2)
Expanding Shortlisted shows Scheduled(5) and Not Scheduled(2)
Not Scheduled modal shows confirm_box column
Not Scheduled modal: Diana Lee has location=Pune
Not Scheduled modal: Eve Wilson has location=Hyderabad
Upload modal shows both Naukri and Pipeline upload zones
Unregistered modal shows Harry Patel, Ivy Chen, Jack Davis

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Dashboard.js line 677 - Rejected panel column array used 'confirm' instead of 'confirm_box'
seed_data_creation: Test data uploaded via /app/test_data/naukri_test.csv (10 records) and /app/test_data/pipeline_test.csv (7 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schema refactor testing complete. Key changes verified: (1) NAUKRI_COLUMN_MAP maps display names (Email ID, Phone Number, Job Title) to snake_case DB fields, (2) Pipeline stores confirm_box NOT confirm, (3) Pipeline stores job_role NOT job_title, (4) Pipeline id → pipeline_id, (5) registered_candidates merges ALL fields from both datasets. Fixed frontend bug where Rejected modal used 'confirm' instead of 'confirm_box'. All relational integrity constraints validated.

schema_validation.naukri_column_mapping: Email ID→email, Phone Number→phone, Job Title→job_title, etc.
schema_validation.pipeline_schema: confirm_box (not confirm), job_role (not job_title), pipeline_id (for id column)
schema_validation.registered_candidates: Merges ALL fields from both naukri_applies and pipeline_data
